facts: OSC RPP 100 (psychology 2015) + DARPA SCORE ~3000 + Birmingham 1,051+ original-vs-replication pairs across fields.
hypotheses: Original-vs-replication is a compound shift (sample + analyst + analysis-method), not a single shift type.
Replication rates are consistent across fields.
unknowns: 'Replication' contested — exact vs conceptual vs systematic pooled but mechanistically different.
Single-shot pair-as-unit presupposed; many-lab replications carry different signal but are rarer.
